mapper.sql: map_id, robot_id, tenant_id, map_name, map_type, map_path, thumbnail, description, map_file, point_count, version, status, is_enable, del_flag, map_base64, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_map WHERE map_id = #{mapId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT FROM sys_map WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '1' ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_map ( robot_id, tenant_id, map_name, map_type, map_path, thumbnail, description, map_file, point_count, version, status, is_enable, del_flag, map_base64, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{robotId}, #{tenantId}, #{mapName}, #{mapType}, #{mapPath}, #{thumbnail}, #{description}, #{mapFile}, #{pointCount}, #{version}, #{status}, #{isEnable}, '0', #{mapBase64}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_map SET del_flag = '1' WHERE map_id = #{mapId}

UPDATE sys_map SET del_flag = '1' WHERE map_id IN
#{mapId}
mapper.select: SELECT point_id AS pointId, map_id AS mapId, point_name AS pointName, point_code AS pointCode, point_type AS pointType, coordinate_x AS coordinateX, coordinate_y AS coordinateY, order_num AS orderNum, status, remark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_point WHERE map_id = #{mapId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY order_num ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_point WHERE map_id = #{mapId} AND del_flag = '0'
